overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring exploration of a neon-lit night market beneath an overpass. The player navigates through narrow alleys with corrugated metal shacks, discovers and loots a corpse, and climbs to an elevated viewpoint overlooking the sprawling futuristic cityscape before returning.

scene_state.functional_zone: night market under highway overpass with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area, observing food stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: seated in red plastic chair near the blue food cart

entered.detail: blue mobile food cart with yellow neon trim and white umbrella canopy
large white market umbrella covering food preparation area
bright cyan neon sign above food stall counter
rusted corrugated metal fencing with vertical bars
white plastic tables and red chairs for outdoor dining

segments.scene_description: The player explores a cyberpunk night market beneath a highway overpass. Neon signs in cyan and magenta illuminate food stalls, including a blue cart with a seated vendor. The ground is wet and reflective, with plastic furniture arranged for customers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with corrugated metal shacks and debris

events.description: moves from open market into narrow enclosed alleyway between metal structures

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the narrow alley, passing trash piles and metal shacks

entered.detail: small structure made of corrugated metal sheets with sloped roof
black garbage bags and scattered cardboard boxes piled against wall
large blue plastic drum sitting in the middle of the alley

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, dimly lit alleyway flanked by corrugated metal shacks. Trash bags and debris litter the ground. The lighting shifts from bright neon to darker, green-tinged artificial light as the space becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: dead-end alley with corpse and loot containers

events.description: approaches and interacts with dead body lying in pool of blood
loot menu interface appears showing Health Booster and other items

agents.ego_description: stopping to loot a corpse, examining items on the body

entered.detail: dead body lying on back in pool of blood with scattered papers
white plastic crates and boxes near the corpse
stacked wooden shipping pallets leaning against metal wall

segments.scene_description: In a dead-end alley, the player discovers a corpse lying in a pool of blood surrounded by trash and white containers. The player stops to loot the body, triggering a game interface showing available items including a Health Booster.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated scaffolding overlook with city skyline view

events.description: begins ascending metal stairs and scaffolding structure
reaches elevated viewpoint revealing panoramic neon cityscape

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs and scaffolding to reach an elevated vantage point overlooking the city

entered.detail: rusted metal scaffolding with stairs and platforms for climbing
stacked metal oil barrels near the scaffolding base
towering skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and billboards
elevated highway structure with vehicles visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The player climbs a metal scaffolding structure, ascending above the alley. Upon reaching the top, the camera reveals a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk cityscape with towering neon-lit skyscrapers, floating advertisements, and a complex network of overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: return through debris-filled alley toward market

events.description: descends scaffolding back to ground level and continues through alley

agents.ego_description: climbing down from the overlook and walking back through the alley toward the market area

entered.detail: returning view of the corrugated metal shack with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The player descends the scaffolding back to the alley floor, passing the corpse once more from a distance. The journey continues back through the narrow passage with corrugated metal walls and scattered debris, heading toward the neon glow of the market.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant neon night market into a grim urban alleyway and up toward a sprawling futuristic skyline. It begins beneath a highway overpass among cyan and magenta food stalls and reflective wet pavement, before moving into a narrow, dimly lit passage flanked by corrugated metal shacks and green-tinged artificial light. As the camera reaches a dead-end, it pauses to loot a corpse lying amidst trash and blood before ascending a metal scaffolding structure. The scene then opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of towering neon skyscrapers and floating advertisements, finally descending back through the debris-strewn alley toward the distant glow of the market.
